name: Agrapp
description: Developer of a field platform intended to offer proper agricultural management. The company's platform specializes in recording activities in an efficient and orderly manner with the ability to deliver financial and agricultural reports, enabling agricultural businesses to make informed decisions regarding crops, workers, labor, supplies, and machinery.

name: Palenca (Vech)
description: Developer of a payroll application programming interface designed to validate income and employment information. The company's tool offers access to any worker's personal information, profile, and earnings, enabling clients to streamline background verification.

name: Pura Mente
description: Developer of a wellness application designed to learn how to meditate and maintain a healthy life balance. The company's platform teaches how to meditate as well as offers free guided sessions, and intermediate and advanced courses, and also offers company-based plans for employees, enabling corporate clients and users to reduce stress levels, and anxiety and increase productivity.

name: SeeMexico
description: Operator of an online travel agency intended to help customers in planning and exploring places during their tours. The company's agency helps find travel deals, and hotels and offers a subscription model and installment payment option for the trips, enabling travelers to pay in smaller amounts and also discover different regions in the country.

name: Yo Fio
description: Developer of microcredit application designed for purchases at informal corner stores. The company's application scans QR codes to show the details of the products being bought and authorizes the purchase by notifying the store and provides credit facilities to corner stores through the app and in partnership with the store gives credit lines to the store customers, enabling customers to buy today and pay in a month.
